action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current telemetry and market data from the wind farm and energy storage system.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_dispatch_step
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a power dispatch command for the current time step and advances the simulation by one step.

curtailment_mw.description: The amount of renewable generation to curtail (not send to the grid or battery) in Megawatts.

battery_charge_mw.description: The power rate for the battery. Positive values indicate charging (drawing from grid/wind), negative values indicate discharging (injecting into grid).

state_description.current_step: The current time step in the simulation (e.g., hour of the day).
state_description.battery_soc_mwh: Current State of Charge of the energy storage system in Megawatt-hours.
state_description.grid_demand_mw: The current electrical load demand from the grid in Megawatts.
state_description.renewable_forecast_mw: Forecasted combined solar and wind generation for the current step.
state_description.marginal_price_usd: The current market price of electricity per MWh.
state_description.cumulative_operating_cost: The total cost incurred since the start of the simulation.
